draftTemplates.important:
Thanks for the note. I read this as a priority item. My suggested reply: {summary}

If helpful, I can tighten this into a shorter version or a more formal tone.
draftTemplates.needs_reply: Thanks for reaching out. I saw your message and will follow up on {next_step}.
draftTemplates.ignore: No reply needed. This looks like routine noise.

examples.label: important
examples.subject: Deadline moved to Friday
examples.body: Please review the revised draft before Friday noon.
examples.reply: I reviewed the revision and will send comments today.

examples.label: ignore
examples.subject: Weekly newsletter
examples.body: You are receiving this because you subscribed.

examples.label: needs_reply
examples.subject: Can you confirm the room booking?
examples.body: Need a quick yes/no before I finalize the calendar invite.
examples.reply: Confirmed. The room booking works for me.
